name: pdf-template-converter
description: Convert a print-ready PDF into either (1) a self-contained Marketing-Builder PRINT template folder (incl. mapping.json for MLS autofill + config-driven agent & co-agent branding + photo role tags) via pdf-to-template, or (2) a data-driven Marketing-Builder EMAIL kit (kit.json with per-block MJML + inline listing/branding labels) via pdf-to-email — both with automated geometry probing, asset extraction, and browser-free or visual self-verification.
